# Colombo Flood Response SOP

## Drainage and road access

When sustained rainfall creates drainage pressure, dispatch inspection teams to blocked canals and culverts before recommending road closures. Field teams must record the obstruction, access condition, and nearest safe diversion route.

## Community readiness

For communities with limited evacuation access, confirm transport availability and temporary shelter capacity. Priority should be based on modeled exposure, population vulnerability, and verified field conditions rather than the model score alone.

## Authority boundary

FloodLens recommendations support planning. Only the responsible government authority may issue an official evacuation order or public warning.
